name: Thuý Huỳnh (Kingsley)
greetingText: I really love your name btw!
wishText:
Happy birthday, my darling ❤️ I hope you have a wonderful day filled with love and happiness. You deserve all the best in the world, and I am so grateful to have you in my life.
"I would watch the universe unravel a thousand times over, as long as you were the last thing I saw 🫵"
